Home → Discography → The Greatest Rapper Alive

The Greatest Rapper Alive

2010 · Thump Records

A boldly titled 15-track album released through Thump Records — notably without Bizzy Bone's knowledge or endorsement, as DJ U-Neek released it without paying him. Despite the controversy, the album is a solid entry in his catalog featuring West Coast g-funk flavors and rapid-fire delivery across subjects from street life to religion.

"Travel through the trouble leapors. Stumble the vestable the vegetable can't move or tremble. Easily assembled. My assembly where these killas roam. Revelations on the xp cause nothings unknown."

— Young Man
01 The Intro produced by DJ Uneek ▷

04 Dig This produced by DJ Uneek ▷
05 Eye Candy produced by DJ Uneek ▷
06 Only in L.A. produced by DJ Uneek ▷
07 3rd Round Knockout produced by DJ Uneek ▷
08 Shoes 'n' Clothes produced by DJ Uneek ▷
09 Young Man produced by DJ Uneek ▷
10 Warriors produced by DJ Uneek ▷
11 One Shot produced by DJ Uneek ▷
12 U.F.O.'s produced by DJ Uneek ▷
13 Yeah, That's It produced by DJ Uneek ▷
14 I Am the Greatest produced by DJ Uneek ▷
15 The Outro produced by DJ Uneek ▷
